---
title: Other animated distributions
description: Other animated distributions worth knowing about.
---

import {
  DistributionFeaturedCard,
  DistributionCard,
  DistributionSection,
  DistributionSuggest,
  FaviconIcon,
} from "@/components/docs/distributions";

**Unlumen UI isn't the only source of great animated components.** Below are the distributions and libraries I use and recommend — plus a few others worth knowing depending on your stack.

<DistributionSection title="Top picks" featured>
  <DistributionFeaturedCard
    href="https://magicui.design"
    name="Magic UI"
    description="One of the largest curated collections of animated React components. Beautiful defaults, Tailwind-based, and actively maintained. Great for landing pages."

<DistributionFeaturedCard
  href="https://animate-ui.com"
  name="Animate UI"
  description="The open-source React component distribution that directly inspired Unlumen UI. Built by Skyleen — primitives-first, composable, and clean. Worth following closely."
  icon={<FaviconIcon domain="animate-ui.com" alt="Animate UI" />}
/>

  <DistributionFeaturedCard
    href="https://skiper-ui.com/components"
    name="Skiper UI"
    description="Sharp, premium-feeling animated components with a distinctive aesthetic. A bit more opinionated than the others — in a good way."
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="skiper-ui.com" alt="Skiper UI" />}
  />
</DistributionSection>

<DistributionSection title="Also worth a look">
  <DistributionCard
    href="https://ui.elevenlabs.io/"
    name="ElevenLabs UI"
    description="Production-grade AI voice UI components"
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="elevenlabs.io" alt="ElevenLabs UI" />}
  />
  <DistributionCard
    href="https://lucide-animated.com"
    name="Lucide Animated"
    description="Animated variants of Lucide icons"
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="lucide-animated.com" alt="Lucide Animated" />}
  />
  <DistributionCard
    href="https://www.shadcnblocks.com/"
    name="Shadcn Blocks"
    description="Ready-made page blocks for shadcn/ui"
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="shadcnblocks.com" alt="Shadcn Blocks" />}
  />
  <DistributionCard
    href="https://supabase.com/ui"
    name="Supabase UI"
    description="Official Supabase component library"
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="supabase.com" alt="Supabase UI" />}
  />
  <DistributionCard
    href="https://www.eldoraui.site/"
    name="Eldora UI"
    description="Open-source animated components"
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="eldoraui.site" alt="Eldora UI" />}
  />
  <DistributionCard
    href="https://aliimam.in/"
    name="Ali Imam"
    description="Curated animated components & effects"
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="aliimam.in" alt="Ali Imam" />}
  />
</DistributionSection>

<DistributionSection title="Vue">
  <DistributionCard
    href="https://vue-bits.dev"
    name="Vue Bits"
    description="The Vue equivalent of React Bits"
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="vue-bits.dev" alt="Vue Bits" />}
  />
  <DistributionCard
    href="https://inspira-ui.com/"
    name="Inspira UI"
    description="Animated components for Vue & Nuxt"
    icon={<FaviconIcon domain="inspira-ui.com" alt="Inspira UI" />}
  />
</DistributionSection>

<DistributionSuggest />
